title: Mentioned
description: Chat filter mod to notify you when you've been mentioned
body:
# Mentioned

A mod made for Minecraft allowing you to set up chat filters, notifying you when a message appears matching your filter.

 

Supports styling and sounds, and includes some anti spam measures.

 

## Config

Config is available as ``[mod profile]/config/ktnmentioned/ktnmentioned.json`` if you're using CurseForge or ``.minecraft/config/ktnmentioned/ktnmentioned.json`` if you use default Minecraft install.

There's also an in game config menu accessible via the K key while in game, or via the mod list menu **(Forge only for now)**.

If you used this mod before 1.1, your old config files should automatically convert to the new ones. But if not, the config menu should have you sorted.

**Note:** Config menu is missing the ``delay`` value, this is still used but for now has to be edited in the config manually. This will be in the config menu in the next update, probably 1.1.1

## Credits

Inspired by the 1.9 mod [Ping!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chat-ping) by [TheSatanicSanta](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thesatanicsanta), but remade from scratch for 1.18.2 and 1.19.2-1.20.4 using both Fabric and Forge.


## Source Code

Source code is available on GitHub via the Source button above
